description: Style NoteAdd a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product DetailsGolden coloured earringsTear drop shaped base with a green coloured similarly shaped stone in the centre and four rows of pearl like beads surrounding it Jhumka (bell shaped dangler) attached to it, pearl like beads at the intersection, green stone design detail on top of the jhumka and pearl beads around it, pearl like beads dangling from the periphery of the jhumka, a green tear drop shaped stone hanging from the centre of the jhumka Push back closure at the backMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 77 mm
